response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 20+ years of distributed systems experience, but the role requires executive leadership with proven team scaling (10 to 30+ people) and production multi-agent AI operations—neither demonstrated on this resume. Limited fintech infrastructure expertise and no evidence of governing external engineering partnerships or regulatory compliance.
strengths: Deep distributed systems and microservices expertise from Dunnhumby's high-scale platform (millions of RPS) with real-time event streaming and API design
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq shows current engagement with agentic AI systems and developer tooling
20+ years of engineering breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains with demonstrated production impact
concerns: No demonstrated people leadership or team scaling—all roles appear to be individual contributor; CTO explicitly requires building and governing 10-30+ person organizations
Limited fintech infrastructure exposure; only RIDE Capital investment focus rather than credit systems, payment flows, liquidity management, or compliance architecture

Vague evidence of production multi-agent AI systems; current description mentions 'contribute to AI-agent infrastructure' without specifics on scope, scale, production failure modes, or evaluation rigor

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and high-scale production experience
